data.return_sunset: Always adjust position to sunset default at end time; Useful if end time is before actual sunset

data_description.delta_position: The cover will only move if the new position differs by at least this percentage. Useful to avoid continuous minor adjustments.
data_description.delta_time: Wait time (in minutes) before the cover can move again. Prevents rapid movements on partly cloudy days.
data_description.start_time: Starting time for each day; before this time, the cover will remain stationary
data_description.start_entity: Entity representing starting time state, overriding the fixed start time set above. Useful for automating the start time with an entity
data_description.manual_override_duration: The duration of manual control before resetting to automatic control
data_description.manual_override_reset: Option to reset the manual override duration after each manual adjustment; if disabled, the duration only applies to the first manual adjustment
data_description.end_time: Ending time for each day; after this time, the cover will remain stationary
data_description.end_entity: Entity representing ending time state, overriding the fixed end time set above. Useful for automating the end time with an entity
data_description.manual_threshold: Movements smaller than this percentage will NOT trigger manual mode. Useful to filter out tiny mechanical adjustments or motor measurement errors.

data.inverse_state: Inverse the state (needed for some covers that don't follow HA guidelines)
data.interp: Set custom open/close positions for My Cover, if it doesn't fully operate at 0-100%

data_description.set_azimuth: The compass direction your window faces (e.g. 180° is South, 90° is East, 270° is West).
data_description.distance_shaded_area: How much direct sunlight you want to allow into the room in meters. Set to 0 to block all sun, or increase to let light reach the floor.
data_description.default_percentage: Default cover position as a percentage
data_description.max_position: Maximum adjustable cover position as a percentage
data_description.fov_left: Maximum angle from the window center where sun can enter. Beyond this, light is blocked by the wall or obstacles.
data_description.fov_right: Maximum angle from the window center where sun can enter.
data_description.group: Select entities to control via integration
data_description.sunset_position: Position to switch to after sunset
data_description.sunset_offset: Offset (±) from sunset time in minutes
data_description.sunrise_offset: Offset (±) from sunrise time in minutes
data_description.min_elevation: Below this angle (e.g. at sunset or sunrise), the sun won't trigger the blind. Use 0° to always track the sun.
data_description.max_elevation: Above this angle (sun high in the sky), the blind stays open. Set to 90° to track the sun even at noon.
data_description.enable_min_position: The blind closes to its minimum position only when the sunlight directly hits the window's glass.
data_description.enable_max_position: The blind opens to its maximum position only when the sunlight directly hits the window's glass.

vertical.description: Add configuration variables to the sensor
vertical.title: Vertical cover

data_description.presence_entity: Entity representing room or home presence status
data_description.weather_entity: Monitors weather conditions, and outside temperature
data_description.outside_temp: Overrides outside temperature from weather entity if both are set
data_description.temp_low: Below this temperature, the integration maximizes solar gain to heat the room.
data_description.temp_high: Above this temperature, if it's hot outside, the integration blocks the sun to keep the room cool.
data_description.transparent_blind: Enable if the blind lets heat through (e.g., perforated blinds, light curtains). Forces fully closed (0%) in summer mode.
data_description.lux_entity: Use lux sensor to determine if cover should reduce glare in presence mode
data_description.lux_threshold: Threshold for lux sensor, above this value glare should be reduced
data_description.irradiance_entity: Use irradiance sensor to determine if cover should reduce glare in presence mode
data_description.irradiance_threshold: Threshold for irradiance sensor, above this value glare should be reduced

data_description.weather_state: Choose the weather conditions that enable automatic window control.

data.inverse_state: Inverse the state (needed for some covers that don't follow HA guidelines)
data.interp: Set custom open/close positions for My Cover, if it doesn't fully operate at 0-100%

data_description.window_height: Adjust the height of the awning from the level of the workarea
data_description.angle: Angle of the attached awning measured perpendicular from the wall to the ground
data_description.distance_shaded_area: How much direct sunlight you want to allow into the room in meters. Set to 0 to block all sun, or increase to let light reach the floor.
data_description.default_percentage: Default cover position as a percentage
data_description.max_position: Maximum adjustable cover position as a percentage
data_description.fov_left: Maximum angle from the window center where sun can enter. Beyond this, light is blocked by the wall or obstacles.
data_description.fov_right: Maximum angle from the window center where sun can enter.
data_description.group: Select entities to control via integration
data_description.sunset_position: Position to switch to after sunset
data_description.sunset_offset: Offset (±) from sunset time in minutes
data_description.sunrise_offset: Offset (±) from sunrise time in minutes
data_description.min_elevation: Below this angle (e.g. at sunset or sunrise), the sun won't trigger the blind. Use 0° to always track the sun.
data_description.max_elevation: Above this angle (sun high in the sky), the blind stays open. Set to 90° to track the sun even at noon.
data_description.enable_min_position: The blind closes to its minimum position only when the sunlight directly hits the window's glass.
data_description.enable_max_position: The blind opens to its maximum position only when the sunlight directly hits the window's glass.

horizontal.description: Add configuration variables to the sensor
horizontal.title: Horizontal cover

data.inverse_state: Inverse the state (needed for some covers that don't follow HA guidelines)
data.interp: Set custom open/close positions for My Cover, if it doesn't fully operate at 0-100%

data_description.set_azimuth: The compass direction your window faces (e.g. 180° is South, 90° is East, 270° is West).
data_description.slat_depth: Depth of each individual slat in centimeters
data_description.slat_distance: Vertical distance between two slats in centimeters
data_description.default_percentage: Default cover position as a percentage
data_description.max_position: Maximum adjustable cover position as a percentage
data_description.fov_left: Maximum angle from the window center where sun can enter. Beyond this, light is blocked by the wall or obstacles.
data_description.fov_right: Maximum angle from the window center where sun can enter.
data_description.group: Select entities to control via integration
data_description.sunset_position: Position to transition to after sunset
data_description.sunset_offset: Offset (±) from sunset time in minutes
data_description.sunrise_offset: Offset (±) from sunrise time in minutes

tilt.description: Add configuration variables to the sensor
tilt.title: Tilted cover

data_description.blind_spot_elevation: Sun elevation below which light is blocked by an obstacle (e.g., a tree or building). Above this, the blind spot is ignored.

blind_spot.title: Blindspot
blind_spot.description: Setup blindspot for the cover. These values are relative degrees to the width of the field of view. Where 0 is the leftmost position taken from the field of view left parameter.

data_description.interp_list: List of interpolation values, where 0 is fully closed and 100 is fully open
data_description.interp_list_new: Custom range of interpolation values, where the beginning should represent closed and the end open

interp.title: Range Adjustment
interp.description:
Adjust the values at which your Cover effectively opens or closes. Ideal for Covers that don't fully open at 0% or close at 100%. 
 The first two sliders are for a 2 point adjustment, the list options are for a multiple point adjustment

data.return_sunset: Always adjust position to sunset default at end time; Useful if end time is before actual sunset

data_description.delta_position: The cover will only move if the new position differs by at least this percentage. Useful to avoid continuous minor adjustments.
data_description.delta_time: Wait time (in minutes) before the cover can move again. Prevents rapid movements on partly cloudy days.
data_description.start_time: Starting time for each day; before this time, the cover will remain stationary
data_description.start_entity: Entity representing starting time state, overriding the fixed start time set above. Useful for automating the start time with an entity
data_description.manual_override_duration: The duration of manual control before resetting to automatic control
data_description.manual_override_reset: Option to reset the manual override duration after each manual adjustment; if disabled, the duration only applies to the first manual adjustment
data_description.end_time: Ending time for each day; after this time, the cover will remain stationary
data_description.end_entity: Ensure that the position is consistently adjusted to the default sunset setting by the end time. This is particularly beneficial when the end time precedes the actual sunset.
data_description.manual_threshold: Movements smaller than this percentage will NOT trigger manual mode. Useful to filter out tiny mechanical adjustments or motor measurement errors.

data.inverse_state: Inverse the state (needed for some covers that don't follow HA guidelines)
